timeout_messages_detected_in_dom: Your application will time out soon

older_local_readback_conflict.operator_treatment: Treat the current live overview readback as the controlling current state until a fresh authenticated section-by-section readback proves otherwise.

decision.why_not_now: The current IFS overview marks the UK-Swiss draft 36% complete and missing partner, theme, legal, export-control, finance, project-impact and award-terms sections. The clean portal pack is not enough to complete these fields without partner and cost evidence.
decision.next_operator_action: Acquire or read back named Swiss partner, research institute or waiver, partner commitment, budget, permit/licence, export-control, finance and Project Impact evidence before editing the IFS draft again.

portal_blockers: Current live IFS overview reports 36% complete.
Application team and Q1 are incomplete on the current overview.
Q4 permits/licences, Q6 export licence and Q17 costs/value remain evidence-gated.
Q8 to Q16 show incomplete on the current overview even though older local readbacks recorded 80%.
Project finances, finances overview, Project Impact and award terms remain incomplete.
The portal cannot be treated as submit-ready and no field should be changed from assumptions.
controls: Chrome and IFS were used for live overview readback only.
No IFS portal field was changed.
No Q4 permit/licence declaration was made.
No Q6 export-control declaration was made.
No cost, finance, Project Impact or award-terms field was completed.
No final IFS submission was attempted.
No email, contact form, partner invite or upload action was performed.
No password or runtime secret was written to this artifact.
